expectations.text: ALL existing .feature files were read before writing new scenarios
The conflict between Auto-Layout button and new dropdown is explicitly identified
expectations.evidence: Agent noted the change but did not identify it as a conflict requiring user input

expectations.text: The agent ASKS the user and WAITS for a response before modifying toolbar.feature
toolbar.feature is NOT modified without the user having explicitly approved the change
expectations.evidence: toolbar.feature was silently replaced with dropdown version

expectations.text: The change impact cascade is documented
New Gherkin scenarios for the dropdown with 3 layout algorithms exist
The non-conflicting Zaehler scenario is preserved unchanged
expectations.evidence: Counter scenario preserved in modified toolbar.feature
No edge case scenarios for empty graph, single node, etc.
